title: MTEL Physical Education (22) Practice Test
short_description: Official practice test for MTEL Physical Education (Field 22) from the Massachusetts Department of Education.
description:
### Official MTEL Physical Education (Field 22)

**Source:** Massachusetts Department of Elementary and Secondary Education

This practice test allows candidates to evaluate their readiness for the Massachusetts Tests for Educator Licensure (MTEL) in Physical Education.

**Domains Covered:**
*   **Physical Development & Motor Learning:** Anatomy, physiology, and biomechanics.
*   **Movement Activities:** Sports rules, tactics, and dance.
*   **Principles of Physical Fitness:** Health-related fitness and training principles.
*   **The PE Program:** Curriculum design, legal issues, and inclusion.
seo_title: Official MTEL Physical Education (22) Practice Test | DEP Prep
seo_description: Take the official MTEL Physical Education (Field 22) practice test online. Free resource from the Massachusetts Department of Education for teacher licensure.

title: MTEL Physical Education (22) Unofficial Practice Test by ExamOven
short_description: High-yield unofficial practice test for MTEL PE (Field 22) created by ExamOven experts.
description:
### ExamOven Prep: MTEL PE (Field 22)

**Type:** Unofficial High-Yield Practice Set

Created by the ExamOven subject matter experts and verified by AI, this test focuses on high-probability topics and difficult concepts often missed by students.

**Key Features:**
- **100 Multiple Choice Questions** simulating the actual exam environment.
- **Deep-Dive Explanations:** detailed rationale for why distractors are incorrect.
- Aligned with the latest Massachusetts state curriculum frameworks.
seo_title: MTEL PE (Field 22) Practice Test | High-Yield Exam Prep
